name: Outfit
license: Open Source / SIL Open Font License
description:
Outfit is the official typeface for brand automation company outfit.io. Inspired by the ligature-rich outfit wordmark, Outfit.io is delighted to release it's own type family. The Outfit typeface links the Outfit written voice to Outfit product marks; on brand by default.

The proof files and QA tests are available automatically via GitHub Actions

Outfit is licensed under the SIL Open Font License. You can find more details about this project here.
